title: Cinematic Studio
description: This modpack is for players looking to create scenes and visual quality for movies, shorts, or videos.
body:
![Banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4cabcfd5b7724b7365a9bce879f73791b00b5673_0.webp)

> ### 🎬 - **Cinematic Studio** transforms Minecraft into a true film production studio. Designed for creators who want to capture scenes, build short films, or produce high-quality videos, this modpack includes recording, editing, and visual enhancement tools that take your projects to the next level. Experience realistic lighting, smooth camera motion, and advanced visual effects, all optimized to provide the best cinematic experience possible.

> _With Cinematic Studio, Minecraft becomes your film set._

-------------------------------------------------

**Resource Pack Organization:**

![Rp 1](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1b75e5678820ec5ceaf00a4b9b9d05471e5d9b1b.png)

**[Patrix 32x is optional] - It makes textures more realistic.**

-------------------------------------------------

<details>
  <summary>⚙️ Optimization Mods</summary>

Async Pack Scan, Bad Optimizations, Dynamic FPS, Entity Culling, Ferrite Core, ImmediatelyFast, Krypton, Lenguage Reload, Lithium, More Culling, Sodium, ThreadTweak, Mod Menu.

</details>

<details>
  <summary>🎥 Cinematic Mods</summary>

Axiom, Flashback, WorldEdit, Camera Utils, Better Third Person, Camerapture, Distant Horizons, Do a Barrel Roll, Emotecraft, Hold My Items, MrCrayfish's Furniture, Wavey Capes, Particular Reforged, Particle Rain, Better Days, Continuity, Modern Guns, Explosive Enhancement, 
Passable Leaves, Dynamic Lights, Not Enough Animations, EMF Y ETF. 

</details>

<details>
  <summary>🔊 Sounds Mods</summary>

Ambient Sounds, Presence Footsteps.  

</details>

<details>
  <summary>🌍 World Generation</summary>

Lithosphere, Still Life, Towns And Towers.

</details>

<details>
  <summary>☀️ Shaders</summary>

BSL, CH Motion, Complementary, Complementary Unbound, Complementary Reimagined, Complementary Reimagines + Euphoria Patches, Photon, Super Duper Vanilla, Visual Vibrance.

- I recommend using (Complementary Reimagines + Euphoria Patches).

</details>

<details>
  <summary>🧱 Resource Packs</summary>

Dronko's alternative Bushy Leaves, 3D Default, 3D Tools and Utils, Actually 3D Stuff, 
Cubic Leaves, Detailed Animations, Dramatic Skys, Fresh AI Tweaks, Fresh Animations, Fresh Animations: Extensions, Fresh Buckets, Fresh Flowers and Plants, Fresh Food, Fresh Music Discs, Fresh Ores and Ingots, Fresh Seeds, Fresh Textures, Patrix 32x (Optional), SPBR, Torches Reimagined, Vanilla Mashup (PBR).

- (Patrix 32x) is ​​optional and goes at the very top.

</details>

<details>
  <summary>📖 Libraries</summary>

CICADA, Cloth Config API, CreativeCore, Cristel Lib, Fabric API, Fabric Language Kotlin, Fzzy Config, Gun Core, LibJF, Optiboxes, oωo (owo-lib), Text Placeholder API, TLib, YetAnotherConfigLib (YACL).

</details>

<details>
  <summary>🔫 Guns</summary>

**Datapack Of Gamingbarn.**

All of the recipes for the guns in this pack can be viewed in the recipe book of the vanilla crafting table. To search for guns, you can type **"shoot"** into the search bar! You can also give youself the guns added by this datapack by running the give function: _**/function give:[gun_name]**_

You can make your own pack just like this by using the [Gun Generator](https://gamingbarn.net/GunGenerator) and [Ammo Generator](https://gamingbarn.net/AmmoGenerator) from gamingbarn.net!

![Guns](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/80164e174ba79e677ce13dd8c0357a8bfd593d08.jpeg)

</details>
